标题: LV Double-Sided Workwear Wool Jacket, crafted from custom luxurious soft double-woven high-density wool and silk blend fabric (with up to 90% wool content). Coarse yet soft, solid yet fluffy, like being enveloped in warm winter sunshine. Redefining the luxury logic of reversible wear with a riot of colors. One side is untamed fantasy, with red and blue tearing through the wool fabric to evoke a wild tension, deconstructing and reassembling the Monogram pattern to keep the century-old totem burning in a contemporary context. The other side is pure ambition, with only a metal LV logo adorning the chest pocket, silently declaring sophistication with its structured silhouette and delicate texture, proving that sophistication does not require a grandiose aura. No need to change outfits; flipping it is a transition from battlefield to banquet, exuding sophistication from within, with a style that knows no boundaries. The fabric jacquard technique weaves a full Monogram pattern on the fabric surface, controlling the intertwining of warp and weft threads, precise density, and tension to create a three-dimensional effect. The exquisite hidden seam pocket technique involves precise cutting, shaping, sewing, and ironing without machine intervention, all done by hand, with infrared positioning cutting bed for high-precision cutting. The straight and delicate overall stitching, comfortable and soft fabric, consistent color without deviation, allows for stylish coordination with the same style, suitable for various occasions, with custom accessories, complete with three labels, unisex! Sizes: 44-46-48-50 S-XL.

LV embossed round neck short-sleeve T-shirt, made of 24S combed cotton with a tight plain knit fabric, weighing 180g. The high-count combed cotton yarn is processed with a tight spinning technique to eliminate most of the short fibers, making the yarn smoother and stronger. The fabric is exceptionally dense, smooth, and soft, with excellent anti-pilling and durability, while retaining the natural advantages of breathable and skin-friendly pure cotton. The collar is made of 32S 1x1 rib weighing 300g, with finer yarn creating a more delicate and dense rib, providing better resilience and anti-deformation than regular rib, ensuring the collar stays firm after multiple wears. The innovative process includes silicone padding and embossing technique, where the embossing is done by heating and shaping with upper and lower molds, and the fabric is rolled under pressure at a certain temperature to create a three-dimensional embossed pattern. This results in a full and three-dimensional pattern with a unique soft elasticity, different from traditional stiff embroidery. The silicone support ensures that the pattern is not easily wrinkled or deformed after washing, combining visual novelty with durable craftsmanship. The overall stitching is straight and delicate, the fabric is comfortable and soft, with consistent color and no color difference, suitable for creating stylish looks for various occasions, with custom accessories, complete with three labels, available in unisex sizes XS-L.

LV 2025FW new hand-written logo T-shirt. This T-shirt is made of soft cotton knit, featuring a slightly tapered design and ribbed round neckline for a casual fit. The hand-written Louis Vuitton logo is embroidered on the chest, making it an elegant choice for daily wear. The yarn count is 60, which is a fine and soft high-count cotton yarn. The fabric is crafted with a focus on the delicate texture of high-count cotton, with a double-sided weave for enhanced practicality. The single-ply structure makes the fabric lightweight and breathable, while the double-sided knitting technique ensures consistent texture on both sides, with a tight structure and good elasticity that prevents rolling edges. The fabric has a delicate touch suitable for close-fitting wear. The flat needle embroidery technique is a special embroidery method that uses flat stitches to create a three-dimensional effect. By precisely controlling the depth and angle of the stitches and increasing density and length, this technique creates a rich three-dimensional effect and depth. Sizes available: XS-L.

LV Monogram Flared Jeans, tailored in blue shadow encrypted pure cotton classic denim fabric, featuring the iconic Monogram pattern throughout. The relaxed flared silhouette is the essence of these jeans, exuding a sense of luxury from within. Laser burning technique is used to intricately carve patterns onto the material surface by rapidly heating specific areas to melt and form the LV logo pattern with precise control over position and shape. The dual washing technique involves pre-treating the denim fabric with enzyme wash followed by sand wash to create a faded effect, then chemically treating and dyeing the denim for a unique color contrast effect. The gradient effect is achieved by first positioning the spray horse and then hand rubbing to create a gradual transition. Using a spray gun, the chemicals are precisely sprayed onto specific areas to react with the fabric, resulting in a gradual gradient effect, followed by water boiling for reinforcement. Sizes available: 36-38-40-42 S-XL.

LV hollowed-out letter short-sleeved shirt, made of 240-count, 100% combed cotton yarn, with dyed yarn in fixed colors. The fabric is knitted by a 12-gauge computer machine, taking 165 minutes per piece. Pay special attention to the hole-picking position during knitting to avoid dropped stitches. The sewing is done with a combination of 20-gauge and 16-gauge discs, with the front chest edge and upper sleeve seam to be completed in 20 stitches, and buttonholes and collar to be completed in 16 stitches. Changing machines back and forth increases sewing time. Extra care is needed for sewing the front pocket. When ironing the back, pay special attention to ensuring symmetry on both sides of the chest. Sizes: S-XL.

LV 2025ss new racing checkered knit short-sleeve T-shirt, made of custom 260g double yarn tightly woven smooth cotton fabric. The garment is tailored with a three-dimensional positioning cut, providing a handsome and well-fitted look. Available in sizes S-M-L.
